changes_since_baseline: Added public-readiness, docs-export, and landing-page artifacts for cold reviewer onboarding.
Added snapshot-ledger, snapshot-compare, and review-queue artifacts for deterministic state and follow-up review.
Added policy-profile, policy-compare, and policy-gallery artifacts for research-only threshold review.
Added release-compare, promotion-pack, and adoption-notes artifacts for cross-run review and thesis-ledger reuse.
Added final-handoff and maintainer-note artifacts for release owner and maintainer evidence.
Updated package metadata to production/stable v1.0.1 while preserving zero runtime dependencies.
Updated the local build backend to read the package version and emit reproducible wheel/sdist archives.
Expanded CLI regression and public safety tests for command metadata, deterministic outputs, packaged data, and no-advice boundaries.
no_advice_boundaries: no buy, sell, hold, target allocation, or trade recommendations

release_checks.name: tests
release_checks.owner_action: Run `python -m pytest -q` from the source checkout.

release_checks.name: package
release_checks.owner_action: Build with the local zero-dependency backend and inspect metadata.

release_checks.name: wheel-smoke
release_checks.owner_action: Install the built wheel in a clean environment and run `fund-exposure-lookthrough --version` plus `selfcheck --root .`.

release_checks.name: no-advice-boundaries
release_checks.owner_action: Confirm docs and generated reports preserve static research-only language.

release_checks.name: no-workflows
release_checks.owner_action: Confirm no workflow automation files are present.

release_risks.mitigation: Regenerate command-matrix, release-manifest, artifact-catalog, release-checklist, asset-health, bundle-export, maintainer-note, final-handoff, and final-qa before tagging.
release_risks.risk: Generated artifact drift after source edits

release_risks.mitigation: Run the wheel-build and wheel-smoke commands manually from a clean checkout.
release_risks.risk: Wheel smoke omitted because there is no workflow automation

release_risks.mitigation: Run fixture-doctor with an explicit --as-of date and update user-supplied fixture source metadata when needed.
Reject changes that add live fetches, orders, recommendations, target allocations, trades, or return predictions.
release_risks.risk: Scope creep into live data, broker connectivity, or advice

safety: Research use only. This static report is not investment advice, does not recommend buys, sells, holds, target allocations, or trades, and uses only user-supplied fixture data.
summary: deterministic final QA packet for release review

verification_commands.expected: All tests pass, including deterministic artifact and public safety coverage.
verification_commands.name: tests

verification_commands.expected: JSON reports ok=true with required files present and public hygiene clean.
verification_commands.name: selfcheck

verification_commands.expected: JSON reports ok=true and findings is empty.
verification_commands.name: public-scan

verification_commands.expected: Release checklist reports ok=true across tests, package, smoke, public scan, boundaries, and workflow absence.
verification_commands.name: release-checklist

verification_commands.expected: Wheel builds with no runtime dependency resolution.
verification_commands.name: wheel-build

verification_commands.command: python -m pip install --force-reinstall --no-deps dist/fund_exposure_lookthrough-1.0.1-py3-none-any.whl && fund-exposure-lookthrough --version && fund-exposure-lookthrough selfcheck --root .
verification_commands.expected: Installed CLI reports 1.0.1 and selfcheck passes.
verification_commands.name: wheel-smoke
